title: Spicy Croatian Avocado Stir-fry
description: A salty, creamy breakfast dish featuring a blend of tandoor spices and ginger to bring out the avocado's natural sweetness with a keto-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: red chili flakes
ingredients.notes: optional, increase if you like it hotter

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: adjust based on preference for crispiness or softer texture

instructions: Slice the avocado in half and remove the pit. Scoop out the flesh into a mixing bowl.
Mince two garlic cloves and finely grate about 1/2 inch of ginger root, then mix them into the avocado flesh.
Add tandoori powder to taste and salt to enhance the flavors without overpowering the avocados' sweetness.
Whisk in red chili flakes if you prefer a bit more heat, otherwise this step can be skipped for those who prefer milder dishes.
Drizzle 2 tablespoons of olive oil over the mixture until well combined. The amount may vary based on personal preference to achieve your desired crispiness or soft texture.
Heat up a non-stick skillet or wok with a drizzle of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Once hot, pour in the avocado mix and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until all ingredients are heated through and the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve immediately while hot. This dish is best enjoyed as part of your brunch, providing you with a balanced meal that's both flavorful and satisfying.
